game_overlays.matchupNote: The Avalanche and Golden Knights collide in a high-stakes Western Conference Final showdown where the winner seizes critical series momentum and the inside track to the Stanley Cup Final. With both squads boasting elite rosters, tonight’s clash is a heavyweight battle of speed versus grit that will define the trajectory of this series.

With the Western Conference Finals deadlocked at 2-2, tonight’s pivotal Game 5 serves as a high-stakes gut check to see which squad seizes control before the series shifts back to San Antonio. Expect a desperate, physical battle as both teams fight to avoid the precarious position of facing elimination on the road.
